description_long: A scattered group of rectangular parcels is arranged on the ground, each box varying slightly in size and orientation. The parcels are made of worn, light brown cardboard, with visible creases, folds, and some subtle stains, suggesting they have been handled or stored outdoors. Several boxes are open, revealing empty interiors, while others are closed, with some showing flaps partially ajar. The surfaces are matte and slightly rough, with some boxes displaying faint printed labels or markings. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, typical of packages found in urban delivery or storage settings. The group is loosely clustered, with some boxes stacked or leaning against each other.
description: A cluster of worn, light brown cardboard parcels, some open and some closed, scattered and stacked in a utilitarian arrangement.
description_view_0: A frontal view showing the open tops and interiors of several parcels, with a clear display of their rectangular shapes and varying lid positions.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the depth and height of the parcels, with some boxes stacked and others lying flat, emphasizing their three-dimensional form.
description_view_2: A rear view showing the closed backs and bottoms of the parcels, with less visibility of the interiors and more focus on the exterior surfaces.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, displaying the arrangement of boxes from the other end, with some open flaps and stacked parcels visible.
